name: Chinese Noodles with Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Carrot, cut into matchstick pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Make Peanut Sauce and set aside.
2. Cook vermicelli on range, in the conventional way. Drain and keep warm.
3. Place chicken in a 3-quart casserole. Coat chicken with soy sauce and sherry. Add ginger, garlic, and onions; toss.
4. Cover with lid or vented plastic wrap. Microwave on high for 4 minutes or until chicken is no longer pink. Stir midway through cooking.
5. Add carrot; cover again and microwave on high for 1 1/2 minutes.
6. Add cucumber and warm noodles; toss with Peanut Sauce.
7. Sprinkle chopped peanuts over top.
Peanut Sauce:
1. Place all ingredients in a 1 cup glass measure.
2. Microwave on high for 1 minute. Whisk mixture until well combined; set aside.
